content.full_text:
October 9, 2002

Judy Macfarlane, City Clerk
City of San Ramon
Post Office Box 5148
San Ramon, CA 94583

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-269

Dear Ms. Macfarlane:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice on the mass mailing provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ Under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed, unless you are an authorized representative of the candidate for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis.

Should you have additional questions regarding this matter, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
GW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-02-269

1. Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
